message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model trait tests and fix paginator KeyMsg usage

- Add comprehensive Model trait unit tests for Help component
- Add Model trait unit tests for Stopwatch component
- Fix paginator tests to use KeyMsg::from_type() and KeyMsg::from_char()
  instead of non-existent KeyMsg::new() and KeyCode
- Minor formatting fixes in textarea.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
